span.p: Choose a Power BI storage mode

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Is the data in OneLake
as Delta tables
Lakehouse or Warehouse?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Need always-live data
and tolerate slower queries?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DIRECTQUERY
federates each query to source

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IMPORT
cache copy; refresh is heavy

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Replicating the whole volume
into VertiPaq impractical,
and want near-real-time freshness?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DIRECT LAKE
read Delta on demand; refresh = framing

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IMPORT
if data fits + refresh cost acceptable

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Need composite models / no fallback,
OR fallback-aware over the SQL endpoint?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Direct Lake ON ONELAKE
errors if unframed; empty on security misconfig

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Direct Lake ON SQL
falls back to DirectQuery
